title: CloudFront Origins, OAC, SSE-KMS, and Private Delivery · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible private CloudFront-to-S3 origin contract with one identity, byte, checksum, policy, cache, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in private CloudFront-to-S3 origin contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Distinguish regular S3 origins from website endpoints by HTTPS, OAC, redirects, error pages, methods, and public-access requirements.
Configure OAC with always-sign where appropriate and define viewer protocol, origin protocol, request signing, and forwarded Authorization behavior.
Scope the CloudFront service principal to the exact distribution SourceArn and required object actions without public or cross-distribution access.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Oai Oac Migration
steps.instruction:
Order the Oai Oac Migration S3, CloudFront, and Go storage-delivery evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Oai Oac Migration.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Oai Oac Migration assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Oai Oac Migration, keep Oai Oac Migration connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.

content.text: A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 7649 during a private media release. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a regular S3 OAC origin with exact distribution and KMS authorization; preserve accessible progress, cancellation, status, and recovery evidence; then introduce a duplicate event or ambiguous response and reconcile without duplicate effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Migrate OAI to OAC with temporary dual authorization, deployed distribution evidence, negative tests, monitoring, and policy rollback.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Oai Oac Migration has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Oai Oac Migration, name the stakeholder, file, object version, authorization, byte, time, concurrency, cache, cost, cleanup, and recovery boundary, Oai Oac Migration precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Oai Oac Migration, trace this concrete input and predict authorization, custody, integrity, range, cache, retry, cost, cleanup, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 7649 during a private media release. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a regular S3 OAC origin with exact distribution and KMS authorization; preserve accessible progress, cancellation, status, and recovery evidence; then introduce a duplicate event or ambiguous response and reconcile without duplicate effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Migrate OAI to OAC with temporary dual authorization, deployed distribution evidence, negative tests, monitoring, and policy rollback.

For S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Oai Oac Migration, challenge the documented misconception with file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: Replacing the origin identity ID in one policy statement is a zero-risk migration.

options.text: Declare S3, CloudFront, and Go stakeholder outcome, file and object identity, owner, state, and byte, time, concurrency, cache, and cost budgets for the debug Oai Oac Migration case
Predict S3, CloudFront, and Go authorization, custody, transfer, integrity, cache, failure, cancellation, cleanup, rollback, and recovery outcomes for the debug Oai Oac Migration case
Run the smallest deterministic S3, CloudFront, and Go storage decision model and retain inspectable changed-case evidence for the debug Oai Oac Migration case
Inject one changed S3, CloudFront, and Go failure, verify bounded cleanup and recovery, and state controlled AWS transfer limits for the debug Oai Oac Migration case

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug S3 Origin Website Boundary
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 6030 during a regional dependency incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a regular S3 OAC origin with exact distribution and KMS authorization; do not treat an ETag, CORS result, emulator, or successful SDK call as stronger proof than it is; then change cache and retrieval cost assumptions and defend the new budget result. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. options.text: Another successful run of the same happy-path example. That claim does not survive the oai oac migration · fault isolation evidence boundary.

For oai oac migration · fault isolation, run one convenient Oai Oac Migration happy path, omit ownership, error, changed input, goroutine stop, and full-toolchain checks, then accept plausible output.
A minimal trace that preserves the preconditions, contradicts the misconception, and satisfies Oai Oac Migration.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Oai Oac Migration
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: storage-go-oai-oac-migration-3tbanh" that uses case 6885 to validate a regular S3 OAC origin with exact distribution and KMS authorization. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import AWS SDK packages, open sockets, contact S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, fuzz, race, leak, controlled AWS, load, fault, security, cost, restore, and production gates.

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Oai Oac Migration.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Oai Oac Migration into observable performance evidence. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Oai Oac Migration, keep Oai Oac Migration connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.

content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Oai Oac Migration, name the stakeholder, file, object version, authorization, byte, time, concurrency, cache, cost, cleanup, and recovery boundary, Oai Oac Migration precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Oai Oac Migration, trace this concrete input and predict authorization, custody, integrity, range, cache, retry, cost, cleanup, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 9268 during a high-traffic evidence intake window. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a regular S3 OAC origin with exact distribution and KMS authorization; preserve accessible progress, cancellation, status, and recovery evidence; then change region, range, or signed header and explain the exact failure boundary. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Migrate OAI to OAC with temporary dual authorization, deployed distribution evidence, negative tests, monitoring, and policy rollback.

For S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Oai Oac Migration, challenge the documented misconception with file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: Replacing the origin identity ID in one policy statement is a zero-risk migration.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Oai Oac Migration
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Oai Oac Migration: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 2601 during an SDK and infrastructure canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a regular S3 OAC origin with exact distribution and KMS authorization; retain stable tenant and file identity without exposing it in metric labels; then introduce a duplicate event or ambiguous response and reconcile without duplicate effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Migrate OAI to OAC with temporary dual authorization, deployed distribution evidence, negative tests, monitoring, and policy rollback.

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Oai Oac Migration.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Oai Oac Migration, keep Oai Oac Migration connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Migrate OAI to OAC with temporary dual authorization, deployed distribution evidence, negative tests, monitoring, and policy rollback.
